'''povanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eucamptodromous|eucamptodromous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eucamptodromous|eucamptodromous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| povanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:povanithi|povanithi]] || [[word:povaniji|povaniji]] || [[word:povanishi|povanishi]] || [[word:povaniki|povaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:povanuthuthu|povanuthuthu]] || [[word:povanujuju|povanujuju]] || [[word:povanushushu|povanushushu]] || [[word:povanukuku|povanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:povanuthu|povanuthu]] || [[word:povanuju|povanuju]] || [[word:povanushu|povanushu]] || [[word:povanuku|povanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:povanufthuf|povanufthuf]] || [[word:povanufjuf|povanufjuf]] || [[word:povanufshuf|povanufshuf]] || [[word:povanufkuf|povanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:povanethe|povanethe]] || [[word:povaneje|povaneje]] || [[word:povaneshe|povaneshe]] || [[word:povaneke|povaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:povanothotho|povanothotho]] || [[word:povanojojo|povanojojo]] || [[word:povanoshosho|povanoshosho]] || [[word:povanokoko|povanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:povanotho|povanotho]] || [[word:povanojo|povanojo]] || [[word:povanosho|povanosho]] || [[word:povanoko|povanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:povanofthof|povanofthof]] || [[word:povanofjof|povanofjof]] || [[word:povanofshof|povanofshof]] || [[word:povanofkof|povanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:povanĂŻfthĂŻf|povanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:povanĂŻfjĂŻf|povanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:povanĂŻfshĂŻf|povanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:povanĂŻfkĂŻf|povanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:povanĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|povanĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:povanĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|povanĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:povanĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|povanĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:povanĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|povanĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:povanĂŻfthĂŻf|povanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:povanĂŻfjĂŻf|povanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:povanĂŻfshĂŻf|povanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:povanĂŻfkĂŻf|povanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:povanĂŻfthĂŻf|povanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:povanĂŻfjĂŻf|povanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:povanĂŻfshĂŻf|povanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:povanĂŻfkĂŻf|povanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:povanĂŠthĂŠ|povanĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:povanĂŠjĂŠ|povanĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:povanĂŠshĂŠ|povanĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:povanĂŠkĂŠ|povanĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:povanathatha|povanathatha]] || [[word:povanajaja|povanajaja]] || [[word:povanashasha|povanashasha]] || [[word:povanakaka|povanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:povanatha|povanatha]] || [[word:povanaja|povanaja]] || [[word:povanasha|povanasha]] || [[word:povanaka|povanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:povanafthaf|povanafthaf]] || [[word:povanafjaf|povanafjaf]] || [[word:povanafshaf|povanafshaf]] || [[word:povanafkaf|povanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:povanasha|povanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:povanshĂ«sha|povanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:povanrosha|povanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:povanmusha|povanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:povanyasha|povanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopovankshĂ«sha|gopovankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopovankrosha|gopovankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopovankmusha|gopovankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopovankyasha|gopovankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:povavanasha|povavanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:povavanshĂ«sha|povavanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:povavanrosha|povavanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:povavanmusha|povavanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:povavanyasha|povavanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopovavankshĂ«sha|gopovavankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopovavankrosha|gopovavankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopovavankmusha|gopovavankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopovavankyasha|gopovavankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pevĂŠnasha|pevĂŠnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pevĂŠnshĂ«sha|pevĂŠnshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pevĂŠnrosha|pevĂŠnrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pevĂŠnmusha|pevĂŠnmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pevĂŠnyasha|pevĂŠnyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopevĂŠnkshĂ«sha|gopevĂŠnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopevĂŠnkrosha|gopevĂŠnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopevĂŠnkmusha|gopevĂŠnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopevĂŠnkyasha|gopevĂŠnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:povfanasha|povfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:povfanshĂ«sha|povfanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:povfanrosha|povfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:povfanmusha|povfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:povfanyasha|povfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopovfankshĂ«sha|gopovfankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopovfankrosha|gopovfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopovfankmusha|gopovfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopovfankyasha|gopovfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
